title: Rhumb Studio: Small but Mighty, Shaped by Curiosity | Codrops
description: A two-person studio working between Bristol and Paris, redefining web design by crafting immersive, spatial experiences that feel less like pages and more like places.

title: Susurrus: Crafting a Cozy Watercolor World with Three.js and Shaders | Codrops
description: A behind-the-scenes look at blending NPR shading, sound, and interaction to shape a meditative WebGL scene.

title: Building 4WIDE: Turning Distortion, Blur, and Motion into a Coherent Experience | Codrops
description: A look at designing and building the 4WIDE website, exploring how distortion, blur, and motion were used to create an expressive experience while balancing clarity and performance.
